name: Carver Cultural Center
description: Carver Cultural Center is a place to play pickleball in Mount Olive, NC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Carver Heights Elementary School
description: Carver Heights Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Goldsboro, NC. There are 4 courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Goldsboro Country Club
description: Goldsboro Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Goldsboro, NC. There are 4 outdoor clay and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Goldsboro Family YMCA
description: Goldsboro Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Goldsboro, NC. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Seymour Johnson AFB
description: Come play pickleball at Seymour Johnson AFB in Goldsboro, NC! There are 2 outdoor clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Amenities include lights.
fees: Private — Requires access to USAF base
